name: breadcrumb
description: Shows the current page location within a navigation hierarchy

meta.name: Breadcrumb
meta.description: Shows the current page location within a navigation hierarchy

props.name: maxVisible
props.description: When items exceed this count, collapse to the first item, an ellipsis, and the trailing items

examples.title: Basic
examples.code: <Breadcrumb items={[{ label: 'Home', href: '/' }, { label: 'Docs', href: '/docs' }, { label: 'Breadcrumb' }]} />

examples.title: Collapsed
examples.code: <Breadcrumb maxVisible={3} items={[{ label: 'Home', href: '/' }, { label: 'Docs', href: '/docs' }, { label: 'Components', href: '/docs/components' }, { label: 'Breadcrumb' }]} />
examples.description: Long trails collapse to the first item, an ellipsis, and the trailing items.
